inputs.name: gate
inputs.desc: Gate tensor [tokens, intermediate_dim] (first half of MLP intermediate)

inputs.name: up
inputs.desc: Up tensor [tokens, intermediate_dim] (second half of MLP intermediate)

outputs.name: out
outputs.desc: Exact SwiGLU output: silu(gate) * up using scalar expf sigmoid

strategies.name: token
strategies.notes: Exact training/parity path processes complete tokens with scalar sigmoid semantics.

constraints.notes: Exact SwiGLU reference path used for training/parity; no SIMD/alignment requirement.

impl.c_declaration: void swiglu_forward_exact(const float *input, float *output, int tokens, int dim);

notes: Exact SwiGLU forward for training/parity: silu(gate) * up with scalar expf-based sigmoid.
